_comment: Mutation testing scoped to domain primitives. Start narrow; expand to src/rules once baseline is stable. Coverage gate prevents weak tests from masking regressions.
_mutate_comment: Mutate domain primitives + rules with isolated unit tests. CommandSafety, ContentAppropriateness, ContentOrganization, FileLocation, ImportResolution, ImportSyntax, MonorepoHierarchy currently lack unit tests — adding mutation testing on them produces 100% no-coverage noise. Add a unit test file before extending this list.
_thresholds_comment: Ratcheted 45 -> 58 after strengthening the weakest rule tests (CommandSafetyRule now scores 67.7% scoped; domain ~92%). `break` gates the OVERALL score, which sits well above the rules sub-layer (~58%) because the domain primitives pull the weighted average up (~68%). 58 leaves comfortable headroom for the scheduled run while ratcheting the floor up as rule tests improve — raise again as more rule tests pin message/severity/location.
